name: Spokeo
steps: Go to spokeo.com and search for your name
Copy the URL of your profile listing
Visit the opt-out page and paste your profile URL
Enter your email address
Check your email and click the confirmation link
notes: May retain data for paid account holders even after removal

name: Whitepages
steps: Search for your listing on whitepages.com
Click on your profile to view details
Copy the URL of your listing page
Go to the suppression request page
Enter the listing URL and your phone number
Complete phone verification via automated call or SMS code

name: BeenVerified
steps: Visit the BeenVerified opt-out search page
Search for your record by name and state
Select your listing from the results
Enter your email address to confirm
Check your email and click the verification link
notes: Also owns PeopleLooker and PeopleSmart

name: Intelius
steps: Go to the PeopleConnect suppression portal
Create an account or log in with your email
Search for your records across Intelius properties
Select the records you want removed
Confirm suppression request
Alternatively, email support@mailer.intelius.com or call 1-888-245-1655
notes: Owns 15+ related people-search sites — opt-out covers all of them

name: MyLife
steps: Visit the MyLife CCPA privacy page
Search for your profile on mylife.com
Copy your profile URL
Submit a deletion request through the CCPA form
Email privacy@mylife.com with your profile link requesting removal
A phone call may be required to complete the process
notes: Known for aggressive upselling during opt-out process

name: PeopleFinder
steps: Search for your profile on peoplefinders.com
Copy the URL of your listing
Go to the opt-out page
Submit the opt-out form with your listing URL
Wait 5-7 business days for processing
notes: May require ID verification for certain requests

name: Radaris
steps: Visit the Radaris privacy control page
Search for your profile listing
Click on your profile and select removal option
Fill out the online removal form
If the form fails, email customer-service@radaris.com with your profile link
Follow up if removal is not completed within 7 days
notes: May need multiple follow-ups to ensure complete removal

name: TruePeopleSearch
steps: Go to the TruePeopleSearch removal page
Enter your name, city, and state
Enter your email address
Complete the CAPTCHA verification
Confirm the removal request
You may need to complete multiple CAPTCHAs

name: FastPeopleSearch
steps: Visit fastpeoplesearch.com
Scroll to the bottom and find the 'Do Not Sell My Info' link
Click through to the opt-out form
Fill in your information and complete the CAPTCHA
Submit the form

name: USSearch
steps: Visit the USSearch Privacy Lock page
Search for your listing on the site
Copy your profile URL
Submit the opt-out form with your details
Follow the instructions sent to your email

name: Pipl
steps: Understand that Pipl is an aggregator, not a primary data source
Visit Pipl's help page for removal information
Identify the original source sites where your data appears
Submit removal requests to each source site individually
After source removals, Pipl will eventually stop displaying your data
notes: Aggregator — must remove data from original source sites individually

name: InstantCheckmate
steps: Visit the InstantCheckmate opt-out page
Search for your record by name and state
Select your listing from the results
Confirm the removal request
Check your email for a verification link and click it

name: ThatsThem
steps: Visit the ThatsThem opt-out page
Search for your listing on the site
Select your record from the results
Fill out the direct opt-out form
Submit the form

name: Acxiom
steps: Visit the Acxiom opt-out page
Fill in your personal information (name, address, email)
Select the types of data you want removed
Submit the opt-out form
Alternatively, call (877) 774-2094 for phone-based removal

name: Oracle/Datalogix
steps: Visit Oracle's privacy choices page
Scroll to the data suppression section
Fill out the opt-out form with your personal information
Submit your request
Expect processing to take several weeks due to corporate review process
notes: Complex corporate process — may take longer than other brokers

name: Krak
steps: Contact your telecom provider (TDC, Telia, Telenor, etc.) and request your number be set to hidden (hemmeligt nummer)
Alternatively, go to opdater.krak.dk and log in with MitID
Select 'Remove my information' and confirm
Changes take up to 2 weeks to propagate across Krak, De Gule Sider, and 118.dk
notes: Krak and De Gule Sider share the same database — removing from one removes from both

name: De Gule Sider
steps: Contact your telecom provider and request a hidden number
Or visit degulesider.dk/hjaelp/personsoeg and follow the instructions
Shares database with Krak — removal from one covers both
Takes up to 2 weeks for changes to appear
notes: Same owner as Krak — cascade removal via telecom is easiest

name: 118.dk (TDC)
steps: Contact your telecom provider and request your number be hidden
Updates within 1 working day after your provider processes the request
No direct opt-out form — removal happens through your telecom provider
notes: Automatically removed when you request a hidden number from your telecom provider

name: Robinsonlisten
steps: Log in to borger.dk with MitID
Navigate to CPR self-service
Register for the Robinson List (marketing opt-out)
Takes up to 3 months for all companies to stop marketing
notes: Official marketing opt-out via CPR registry — companies are legally required to check

name: Navne/adressebeskyttelse
steps: Log in to borger.dk with MitID
Navigate to 'Navne- og adressebeskyttelse'
Apply for name and address protection
Protection lasts 1 year and must be renewed annually
notes: Government-level name/address protection — must be renewed every year

name: Experian/RKI
steps: Visit dininfo.dk to check your credit report
If you have a negative registration, it is automatically deleted after 5 years or when debt is paid
For disputes, email dpodenmark@experian.com
Include your CPR number and explain the issue
Experian has 30 days to respond under GDPR
notes: Credit registry — negative entries automatically removed after 5 years or debt settlement

name: Dun & Bradstreet
steps: Visit the D&B data transparency page
Submit a privacy request form
Specify what data you want removed or corrected
D&B will respond within 30 days under GDPR
notes: Primarily business data — personal data removal possible via GDPR request

name: Google (Ret til sletning)
steps: Visit Google's removal request page
Select 'Remove information you see in Google Search'
Choose the type of content for removal
Submit URLs you want delisted from EU search results
Google reviews each request individually — processing time varies
notes: EU right to be forgotten — only delists from EU Google results, does not remove from source

name: Eniro
steps: Visit eniro.se
Log in with BankID to verify your identity
Request removal of your personal information
Processing takes 4-10 working days
notes: BankID required for identity verification

name: Hitta
steps: Visit hitta.se
Log in with BankID to verify your identity
Navigate to your profile and request removal
Processing takes 4-10 working days
notes: BankID required for identity verification

name: Ratsit
steps: Visit ratsit.se
Log in with BankID
Request removal of your personal data
Be aware that Ratsit holds a publishing certificate (utgivningsbevis) and may refuse full deletion
Processing can take up to 30 days
notes: Has utgivningsbevis — may legally refuse GDPR deletion requests under Swedish constitutional exemption

name: MrKoll
steps: Visit mrkoll.se
Log in with BankID
Request to hide your phone number and address
Note: MrKoll has utgivningsbevis — they can only hide phone and address, not fully delete your record
notes: Has utgivningsbevis — can only hide phone/address, cannot fully delete. GDPR deletion may be refused.

name: Merinfo
steps: Visit merinfo.se/ta-bort-mina-uppgifter
Log in with BankID
Submit your removal request
Processing takes a few working days
notes: BankID removal process — relatively straightforward

name: Birthday
steps: Visit birthday.se/persontogden
Use the removal form or email info@birthday.se
Request deletion of your personal data
Note: logged-in users may still see cached data temporarily
notes: Email info@birthday.se for fastest processing

steps: Visit 1881.no
Find your listing in the directory
Contact 1881 directly to request removal
Submit a GDPR-based deletion request via their contact form or email
notes: Standard GDPR-based deletion process

name: Gulesider
steps: Visit gulesider.no
Find your listing
Contact their privacy team to request removal
Cite GDPR Article 17 (right to erasure) in your request
notes: Standard GDPR-based deletion — contact privacy team directly

name: Fonecta
steps: Email tietosuoja@fonecta.com with your removal request
Include your full name and phone number
Cite GDPR Article 17 in your request
Fonecta has 30 days to respond under GDPR
notes: Email tietosuoja@fonecta.com for GDPR-based deletion
